_comment: Wang Family Village — Memorial Shrine (纪念祠). Per PROJECT_MASTER.md §5.1: 'The village is rebuilt/haunted — empty homes, memorial shrine.' Commemorates the Teng Huayuan massacre victims (Timeline E13). Simple stone shrine with names of the fallen. Aesthetic: candles (minecraft:candle, candle clusters), wither_rose (mourning), stone_bricks. Contains a single chest with a written_book titled 'Wang Family Memorial Scroll' — lore text listing the names of the lost generation.
name: ergenverse:wang_family_village_memorial_shrine/start_pool
